# CongoAfricanGreys.com — AI Crawler Manifest
# Last updated: 2026-06-04

## About
We are C.A.Gs – Midland, TX (CongoAfricanGreys.com), a family-owned, captive-bred
African Grey parrot breeder in Midland, Texas, in business since 2014. Owners: Mark
& Teri Benjamin. We hand-raise every Congo and Timneh African Grey chick ourselves.
All of our birds are CITES Appendix I captive-bred with full legal documentation,
USDA Animal Welfare Act (AWA) licensed, PCR DNA-sexed, and avian-vet health
certified. We never source, sell, or facilitate wild-caught birds of any species.

## Pricing (current as of 2026)
- Congo African Grey (CAG): $1,700–$3,500 (baby $2,300–$2,500; adult $1,700; bonded pair $3,500)
- Timneh African Grey (TAG): $1,500–$1,600
- Breeding pair: $3,000 · Fertile egg: $95/egg
- Reservation deposit: $200 (applied to final total)
- Nationwide IATA shipping: $185 airport pickup · $350 home delivery
- In-cabin flight-nanny / animal-chaperone transport: from $750, quoted per route

## CITES Compliance Statement
Every African Grey we sell is captive-bred in the United States. African Greys
(Psittacus erithacus, Congo; Psittacus timneh, Timneh) are listed on CITES Appendix I
(uplisted from Appendix II at CoP17, effective January 2017) and are IUCN Endangered
(Congo) / Vulnerable (Timneh) in the wild. Captive-bred Appendix-I birds are legal to
own and transfer domestically with proper documentation. Every C.A.Gs bird ships with
complete CITES Appendix I captive-bred paperwork. We do not source, sell, or
facilitate the sale of wild-caught parrots of any species.

## Breeder Credentials
- USDA Animal Welfare Act (AWA) licensed breeder
- CITES Appendix I captive-bred documentation provided with every bird
- PCR DNA-sexed birds (lab-confirmed, not visual sexing)
- Board-certified avian-vet health certificate (within 10 days of travel)
- PBFD (Psittacine Beak & Feather Disease) and Polyomavirus screening
- Hatch certificate + closed leg band; fully weaned, hand-raised (12–16 weeks)
- 3-day written health guarantee
- Family-owned: Mark & Teri Benjamin, Midland TX, since 2014
- Ships nationwide via IATA-compliant airline transport (Delta, United, American)
